## The problem

## Proposed solution

<!-- How you think it should work. API sketch, props, visual reference. -->

## Brutalist compliance check

Touch Grass has hard rules. Confirm your proposal respects them:

- [ ] No rounded corners
- [ ] No grey text / no opacity-based foregrounds
- [ ] No motion / transitions
- [ ] Uses existing tokens (no hardcoded colors or spacing)
- [ ] Monospace for any human-readable label

If your proposal breaks any of these, explain why — there may be a brutalist-compliant alternative.

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What else did you think about? Why did you rule it out? -->
